entities.name: SOYBEAN
entities.description: A legume crop grown in the Phu Pha Man district of Thailand.

entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: A legume crop grown in the Phu Pha Man district of Thailand.

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A cereal crop grown in the Phu Pha Man district of Thailand.

entities.name: PHU PHA MAN DISTRICT
entities.description: A district in Khon Kaen province, Thailand, where crop yield studies were conducted.

entities.name: KHON KAEN PROVINCE
entities.description: A province in Thailand containing the Phu Pha Man district.

entities.name: THAILAND
entities.description: The country where the research on rain-fed production systems was conducted.

entities.name: TAD FA WATERSHED
entities.description: A specific area within Phu Pha Man district used for yield gap analysis.

entities.name: NORTHEASTERN REGION OF THAILAND
entities.description: A region identified as a productive area for rain-fed peanut production.

entities.name: NORTHERN REGION OF THAILAND
entities.description: A region identified as suitable for producing peanut under well-irrigated conditions during the dry season.

entities.name: RAIN-FED CONDITIONS
entities.description: Agricultural conditions relying solely on rainfall for water.

entities.name: IRRIGATED CONDITIONS
entities.description: Agricultural conditions where water is artificially supplied.

entities.name: DRY SEASON
entities.description: The period of the year with minimal rainfall, affecting crop production.

entities.name: SOIL WATER LIMITATION
entities.description: A condition where insufficient soil moisture reduces crop yield.

entities.name: NITROGEN LIMITATION
entities.description: A condition where insufficient nitrogen availability reduces crop yield.

entities.name: LOW RATES OF NITROGEN APPLICATION
entities.description: The practice of applying insufficient nitrogen fertilizer, contributing to yield gaps.

entities.name: PESTS
entities.description: Harmful organisms that contribute to the yield gap in soybean and maize.

entities.name: DISEASES
entities.description: Pathological conditions that contribute to the yield gap in soybean and maize.

entities.name: POTENTIAL YIELD
entities.description: The maximum yield attainable by a crop under optimal management and environmental conditions.

entities.name: YIELD GAP
entities.description: The difference between the potential yield and the actual yield achieved by farmers.

entities.name: CSM-CROPGRO MODELS
entities.description: Simulation models used to quantify the yield potential of soybean, peanut, and maize.

entities.name: YIELD GAP ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method used to quantify the difference between potential and actual crop yields.
